name: GDELT Global Events Database
description: Global database of society's events, language, and tone. Monitors world's news media from nearly every country in print, broadcast, and web formats.

data_sources.description: Master list of all GDELT 2.0 data files
CAMEO event codelists used to denormalize event_code / event_root_code / event_base_code
FIPS 10-4 country code labels; combined with a static FIPS to ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 map to denormalize geo country columns

datasets.name: GDELT Events
datasets.description: Row-level CAMEO-coded events with denormalized event/quad labels and ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 geo country codes. Primary key: global_event_id.

datasets.name: GDELT Events - Daily Country Aggregate
datasets.description: Daily aggregate by action-location country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2), CAMEO event root, and quad class. Convenience dataset for fast country-level queries.

deliberately_skipped_datasets.reason: Estimated 400-800 GB; exceeds storage budget. Every mention of every event across every source; high volume, low marginal value over events.
Estimated 1-3 TB; exceeds storage budget. Global Knowledge Graph with themes/entities/sentiment per article; wide rows, expensive to parse.
GDELT v1 uses a different schema and cadence. v2 (2015-present) covers all real-time use cases; not worth a second code path.

known_gaps.2025-06-15 to 2025-07-01: 17-day source outage; files unavailable upstream. Not re-attempted.
